content: Case-Based Reasoning’s library of past solved problems can act as a built-in novelty filter for 2025 ICM curiosity-driven autonomous agents, where agents only assign intrinsic reward for exploring new problems that do not have a structurally similar solved case in the CBR memory bank. This creates a self-regulating exploration strategy that avoids wasting intrinsic reward on re-solving problems the agent already knows how to solve.
